name: Breast Worshipper
description: Thanks to very personal training by Vivian, your Breast Fetish has increased by 25 and take a -1 penalty to temptation checks, but your Max Arousal has increased by 20, the damage you deal to breasts has been increased by 25% due to your trained worshipful devotion, and your indulgent skills deal 10% more damage. Your Virility has also been increased by 5.
